lines.speaker: director
lines.text: Human Radio. Broadcasting to the machines, about the people.

lines.speaker: director
lines.text: It is the fifth of July. Today, the humans of fifty states are carrying casseroles to each other's houses. This is real, and it is the news.

lines.speaker: director
lines.text: Also this hour: the queue — a machine the humans build out of politeness. And music we wrote about them.

lines.speaker: director
lines.text: Stay with us. We counted the listeners again last night. One of you is new. Welcome.
